creator: mavetju@chello.nl
text:
On Mon, May 08, 2000 at 01:32:14PM -0700, Kris Kennaway wrote:
> On Mon, 8 May 2000 mavetju@chello.nl wrote:
> 
> > 	If you run fetchmail in daemon-mode, it will not close its
> > 	TCP sessions properly. With lsof you will see more and more
> > 	lines with this:
> 
> This is something which should be taken up with the fetchmail developers.
> FreeBSD doesn't typically do bug-fixing of ports unless a patch is
> submitted, and maintainers are only expected to work with what's given to
> them by the developers and get it running on FreeBSD.

Ack, I'll tell the guy who is in charge of the fetchmail port.
Thought this were the proper channels to get this solved, but I
seemed wrong....

Edwin
